nasb.text: But they cried out with a loud voice, and covered their ears and rushed at him with one impulse.

esv.text: But they cried out with a loud voice and stopped their ears and rushed together at him.

cnv.text: 眾人大聲喊叫，掩著耳朵，一齊向他衝過去，

ccb.text: 众人大喊大叫，捂着耳朵，蜂拥而上，

csbs.text: 于是他们大声喊叫，捂着耳朵，一齐向他冲过去，
